note_en: This material catalogue only organises public-source hints and general suggested-preparation items. It is not the bank's official required-document list; actual requirements are subject to BOCHK relationship-manager confirmation and final approval.
note_zh: 本材料目录仅整理公开来源提示与一般性建议预备项，不代表银行正式必交清单；实际所需文件以 BOCHK 客户经理确认及最终审批为准。

bochk_back_to_back_lc.product_description: 中间商凭原信用证开立涉及同批货物的另一张信用证。

bochk_export_bills_advance.product_description: 货物装运后，凭出口托收单据获得现金垫款。
bochk_export_bills_advance.product_description_en: Cash advance against export bills after shipment.

bochk_export_bills_collection.product_description: 向银行提交单据后寄送买方银行，付款或承兑后放单。
bochk_export_bills_collection.product_description_en: Send export documents to the buyer's bank for release on payment or acceptance.

checklist_items.label_en: Export documents under the Letter of Credit

bochk_export_bills_lc_collection.product_description: 信用证项下出口汇票托收及按请求提供审单服务。
bochk_export_bills_lc_collection.product_description_en: Collection and optional document checking for export bills under L/C.
bochk_export_bills_lc_collection.product_name: 信用证项下出口汇票托收
bochk_export_bills_lc_collection.product_name_en: Export Bills Under L/C for Collection
required_documents_en: Export documents under the Letter of Credit
bochk_export_bills_lc_collection.source_title: Export Bills Under L/C for Collection

checklist_items.label_en: Export documents under the Letter of Credit

bochk_export_bills_lc_negotiation_discou.product_description: 提交符合信用证条款的出口单据后获得融资。
bochk_export_bills_lc_negotiation_discou.product_description_en: Advance against export documents compliant with L/C terms.
bochk_export_bills_lc_negotiation_discou.product_name: 信用证项下出口汇票议付／贴现
bochk_export_bills_lc_negotiation_discou.product_name_en: Negotiation / Discount of Export Bills Under L/C
required_documents_en: Export documents under the Letter of Credit
bochk_export_bills_lc_negotiation_discou.source_title: Negotiation / Discount of Export Bills Under L/C

bochk_export_invoice_discounting.fee_text: 手续费：融资金额的 1/4%，最低 HK$500
bochk_export_invoice_discounting.fee_text_en: Handling fee: 1/4% of financing amount, minimum HK$500
bochk_export_invoice_discounting.product_description: 交付货物后凭发票和交付证明取得短期贷款。
bochk_export_invoice_discounting.product_description_en: Short-term financing against an invoice and evidence of delivery.

bochk_factoring.product_description: BOCHK 贸易服务概览列出的保理服务。

bochk_foreign_exchange_services.product_description: BOCHK 贸易服务概览列出的外汇服务。

bochk_forfaiting.product_description: BOCHK 贸易服务概览列出的福费廷服务。

bochk_guarantee_bond_standby_lc.product_description: BOCHK 贸易服务概览列出的担保、保函及备用信用证服务。
bochk_guarantee_bond_standby_lc.product_description_en: Guarantee, bond and standby L/C service listed by BOCHK.

bochk_import_bills_collection.product_description: 供应商通过银行寄送单据，满足付款条款后放单。
bochk_import_bills_collection.product_description_en: Import collection with release of documents after payment terms are fulfilled.

bochk_import_invoice_financing.fee_text: 手续费：融资金额的 1/4%，最低 HK$500
bochk_import_invoice_financing.fee_text_en: Handling fee: 1/4% of financing amount, minimum HK$500
bochk_import_invoice_financing.product_description: 赊账采购项下凭供应商发票申请融资。
bochk_import_invoice_financing.product_description_en: Open-account import financing against a supplier invoice.

bochk_import_loan.product_description: 进口托收项下即时付款资金不足时取得货物或单据。
bochk_import_loan.product_description_en: Import-collection financing when immediate liquidity is insufficient.

bochk_lc_advising_confirmation.product_description: 信用证通知及按请求加具保兑。

bochk_lc_issuance.product_description: 根据买方指示向供应商开立信用证。
bochk_lc_issuance.product_description_en: Issue an L/C to the supplier on the buyer's instructions.

checklist_items.label_en: Letter of Credit marked as transferable

bochk_lc_transfer.product_description: 在信用证可转让时全部或部分转让给供应商。
bochk_lc_transfer.product_description_en: Transfer all or part of a transferable L/C to suppliers.
required_documents_en: Letter of Credit marked as transferable

bochk_packing_loan.fee_text: 手续费：融资金额的 1/8%，最低 HK$350
bochk_packing_loan.fee_text_en: Handling fee: 1/8% of financing amount, minimum HK$350
bochk_packing_loan.product_description: 以信用证作担保的装运前生产成本融资。
bochk_packing_loan.product_description_en: Pre-shipment production-cost financing secured by an L/C.

bochk_pre_shipment_financing.fee_text: 手续费：融资金额的 1/4%，最低 HK$450
bochk_pre_shipment_financing.fee_text_en: Handling fee: 1/4% of financing amount, minimum HK$450
bochk_pre_shipment_financing.product_description: 收到采购订单后的原材料及营运开支融资。
bochk_pre_shipment_financing.product_description_en: Financing for raw materials and overheads after receipt of a purchase order.

bochk_sfgs_80_guarantee_product.product_description: 经 BOCHK 申请的中小企融资担保计划八成担保产品。
bochk_sfgs_80_guarantee_product.product_description_en: BOCHK application path for the SFGS 80% Guarantee Product.
bochk_sfgs_80_guarantee_product.product_name: 中小企融资担保计划 - 八成担保产品
bochk_sfgs_80_guarantee_product.product_name_en: SME Financing Guarantee Scheme - 80% Guarantee Product
bochk_sfgs_80_guarantee_product.source_title: SME Financing Guarantee Scheme - 80% Guarantee Product

bochk_shipping_guarantee.product_description: 货物早于装运单据到达时，由银行加签提货担保。
bochk_shipping_guarantee.product_description_en: Countersigned shipping guarantee when goods arrive before shipping documents.

bochk_small_business_loan_unsecured.product_description: 灵活无抵押小企业贷款。
bochk_small_business_loan_unsecured.product_name: 中银「小企业贷款」无抵押贷款

bochk_supply_chain_document_checking.product_description: 供应链融资方案中的贸易单据审查服务。
bochk_supply_chain_document_checking.product_description_en: Trade-document checking service under the supply-chain solution.

bochk_supply_chain_finance_solution.product_description: 面向核心买方和供应商的综合供应链融资方案。
bochk_supply_chain_finance_solution.product_description_en: Comprehensive supply-chain solution for anchor buyers and suppliers.

bochk_supply_chain_invoice_payment.product_description: 核心买方确认付款后，BOCHK 无追索权购买供应商应收账款并提前付款。
bochk_supply_chain_invoice_payment.product_description_en: Early supplier payment by non-recourse purchase of receivables after the anchor buyer's undertaking.

checklist_items.label_en: Purchase Order (PO) provided by the anchor buyer or Sales Order (SO) confirmed by the anchor buyer
checklist_items.label_zh: 核心买方提供的采购订单（PO）或经核心买方确认的销售订单（SO）

bochk_supply_chain_pre_shipment_financin.product_description: 供应商在核心买方确认付款前取得短期融资。
bochk_supply_chain_pre_shipment_financin.product_description_en: Conditional short-term financing before anchor-buyer payment confirmation.
required_documents: 核心买方提供的采购订单（PO）或经核心买方确认的销售订单（SO）
required_documents_en: Purchase Order (PO) provided by the anchor buyer or Sales Order (SO) confirmed by the anchor buyer

bochk_trust_receipt_facilities.product_description: 信用证项下付款前取得货物或装运单据。
bochk_trust_receipt_facilities.product_description_en: Take possession of goods or shipping documents under an L/C before payment.
